name: effnet5fold_lse
hypothesis: EffNet 5-fold (all folds trained) + LSE inference pooling으로 0.930+ 달성
changes: LSE inference pooling (forward_features → mean(freq) → head → LSE over time)
TTA (shifted chunks) + Gaussian temporal smoothing 유지
rationale: 1-fold+LSE없이도 +0.001 효과. 5-fold는 분산 감소로 더 강한 CNN. LSE는 temporal multi-instance learning으로 +0.028 효과 (BirdCLEF 2023). MPS에서 forward_features 학습은 느리므로 추론 시에만 LSE 적용.
